title: Green Thumb Industries Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results
text: Green Thumb Industries reported strong results for the fourth quarter and full year 2024. Q4 2024 revenue reached $294.3 million, up 5.8% year-over-year. Net income for Q4 was $12.7 million ($0.05 per basic share). Adjusted EBITDA of $97.8 million, representing 33.2% of revenue. Cash position of $172 million at quarter end. For full year 2024, total revenue increased 7.8% to $1.1 billion. Net income grew to $73.1 million ($0.31 per basic share). Adjusted EBITDA reached $371.3 million, up 14% year-over-year. Operating cash flow of $195 million (net of $131 million in tax payments). The company opened 10 new RISE Dispensaries during 2024, bringing the total to 101 retail locations across 14 states. In Q4 alone, three stores launched in Nevada, Minnesota, and Florida. According to CEO Ben Kovler: Demand for THC in America is at an all-time high, and Green Thumb is well-positioned to deliver on this opportunity. Green Thumb repurchased approximately 3.9 million subordinate voting shares for $43 million throughout 2024, demonstrating confidence in shareholder value creation while maintaining a strong balance sheet with $255 million in total debt.
